creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Christoph,

thanks for report.

Quick question here - am I right nginx has been built with dynamic modules support (DSO option).  If so, then could you please check and confirm a line with `load_module' directive have been added at the top of the nginx.conf, see http://nginx.org/en/docs/ngx_core_module.html#load_module for details.
